summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FALINTIL-FDTL Personnel Management System (PMS). Backend APIs fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend authentication and dashboard working correctly with minor UI navigation issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation menu items not clickable via Playwright automation
ui_bugs.details: Elements are present but not visible/clickable for automation. Manual navigation works but automated testing fails.

design_issues.details: Multiple console warnings about chart width/height being -1. Charts display but with rendering issues.

passed_tests: All Constants Endpoints (postos, unidades, municipios, etc.)
Member CRUD Operations (Create, Read, Update, List)
Member Status Filtering (Ativo, Falecido, Separação, Reserva, Reforma)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix sidebar navigation clickability issue for automated testing. The navigation elements have proper data-testid attributes but are not accessible via Playwright. Consider CSS visibility or z-index issues.
